subject: Upgrade npm version
commit_message:

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-master-verify-java/5253/ : SUCCESS

Patch Set 1:

You're right, but it would require more testing which I don't have capacity for currently.
Different dependencies can be sometimes sensitive to the node/npm versions.
At the moment I'm confident it works with 6.1.0 - but later is better.

BTW The motivation is this commit: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/97927
Eric tried it, and looks like it fixes the issue with sdc-maven-stage-master job that keeps failing.

The priority is to fix the Jenkins job - unless we have resources to upgrade and confirm it works well. Feel free to upload another patchset :-)
